problem id: f3bfb3bf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00011001 -> 10000001
  10000001 -> 10001000
  11100111 -> 10001110
  01110110 -> 00000111
  01011000 -> 00000101
  11101001 -> 10001110
  10110111 -> 10001011
  11111000 -> 00001111

query: 10111011
predicted answer: 10001011
